summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were found, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-creation actions are permitted for this job. Useful open PRs are kept open for maintainer/proof/review follow-up rather than closed as low-signal or duplicates.
